item.title: MIUI OS2.0.204.0.VMGMIXM Fastboot update for Redmi Note 12 4G NFC Global
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Redmi Note 12 4G NFC Global

Codename: topaz

Version: OS2.0.204.0.VMGMIXM | 15.0

Size: 7.6 GB

MD5: bbb8ab2ec22e4239d708ce9b7ca78624

Changelog:
[System]
Updated the security patch to February 2026. Increased system security.

Download: Here
